raw_title: SE-Search: Self-Evolving Search Agent via Memory and Dense Reward
raw_content: arXiv:2603.03293v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Retrieval augmented generation (RAG) reduces hallucinations and factual errors in large language models (LLMs) by conditioning generation on retrieved external knowledge. Recent search agents further cast RAG as an autonomous, multi-turn information-seeking process. However, existing methods often accumulate irrelevant or noisy documents and rely on sparse reinforcement learning signals. We propose \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{E}volving \textbf{Search}, a Self-Evolving Search agent that improves online search behavior through three components, memory purification, atomic query training, and dense rewards. SE-Search follows a \textit{Think-Search-Memorize} strategy that retains salient evidence while filtering irrelevant content. Atomic query training promotes shorter and more diverse queries, improving evidence acquisition. Dense rewards provide fine-grained feedback that speeds training. Experiments on single-hop and multi-hop question answering benchmarks show that \texttt{SE-Search-3B} outperforms strong baselines, yielding a $10.8$ point absolute improvement and a $33.8\%$ relative gain over Search-R1.\footnote{We will make the code and model weights publicly available upon acceptance.}
generated_title: SE-Search：自进化搜索代理提升RAG性能
generated_summary: 提出自进化搜索代理SE-Search，包含记忆净化、原子查询训练和密集奖励三个组件，在问答基准测试中较Search-R1提升10.8个百分点。
generated_analysis:
RAG技术是当前大模型应用落地的关键基础设施，其核心价值在于通过外部知识检索降低模型幻觉、提升回答准确性。随着企业级AI应用场景的深化，单纯依赖单次检索已难以满足复杂问答需求，多轮自主搜索代理成为技术演进方向。然而，现有方案普遍面临检索质量下降的困境——随着对话轮次增加，无关文档在上下文中的累积会导致模型“迷失”在噪音中，同时稀疏的强化学习信号也制约了搜索策略的快速迭代。

SE-Search提出的三大技术组件具有明确的工程意义：记忆净化机制通过动态筛选保留关键证据而非简单堆砌，实质上解决了长对话场景下的上下文污染问题；原子查询训练鼓励模型生成更精准、多样化的搜索请求，从源头提升检索质量；密集奖励则提供了更细粒度的训练反馈，加速策略优化。

对于行业而言，3B参数规模达到这一性能水平具有重要参考价值，表明端侧部署高质量搜索代理的可行性。预计未来一年内，大模型厂商将密集跟进类似架构，RAG工作流将从“检索-生成”的简单拼接转向“思考-检索-记忆”的自适应闭环。企业决策者在选型时应重点关注搜索代理在长上下文、多轮对话场景下的稳定性和检索效率指标。
